tasks.label: list-mongo-collections-clean
args: require('dotenv').config(); const mongoose=require('mongoose'); (async()=>{ try{ await mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI); const cols=await mongoose.connection.db.listCollections().toArray(); console.log('DB_OK'); console.log('Collections:', cols.length ? cols.map(c=>c.name).join(', ') : 'none'); } catch(e){ console.error('DB_ERROR', e.message); process.exitCode=1; } finally { await mongoose.disconnect(); } })();
